message:
perf(tests): speed up cmd/bd test suite from ~158s to ~50s (bd-1rh)

Consolidate show_test.go to build bd binary once instead of 3 times.
Group 12 init_test.go tests into 3 parent functions (sync-branch,
BEADS_DIR, redirect) sharing setup helpers. Add t.Parallel() to 38
test functions across 8 files that use isolated temp dirs and no
shared global state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ import (
 )
 
 func TestCreateSuite(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Parallel()
 	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
 	testDB := filepath.Join(tmpDir, ".beads", "beads.db")
 	s := newTestStore(t, testDB)
